plugins.prepareCmd: rm -rf ./nupkgs && dotnet build Hexalith.FrontComposer.slnx --configuration Release -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} -p:PackageVersion=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet pack Hexalith.FrontComposer.slnx --no-build --configuration Release --include-symbols --include-source --output ./nupkgs -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} -p:PackageVersion=${nextRelease.version} -p:ContinuousIntegrationBuild=true
plugins.publishCmd: dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs/*.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key "$NUGET_API_KEY" --skip-duplicate && dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs/*.snupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key "$NUGET_API_KEY" --skip-duplicate
